name: Rockwell Collins, Inc.
description: Rockwell Collins, Inc. was a leader in aviation and high-technology solutions for commercial and military customers. The company designed, produced, and supported communications, flight control, aircraft cabin, and navigation systems. Its products and electronics were installed in the cockpits of nearly every airline in the world, and its airborne and ground-based communication systems transmitted a significant portion of all U.S. military communication. In 2018, Rockwell Collins was acquired by United Technologies Corporation and is now part of Collins Aerospace.
